In a vitamix blender, add the truffle shavings and vinegar and blend on high until smooth.
Once smooth and homogenous, slowly add the oil to emulsify.
While still blending, add xantham gum last, until combined and to the desired consistency.
Reserve to quart containers and store in the cooler.
